mapper.select: SELECT ZPDILEGSETID AS rule_id, ZPDIPRJID AS project_id, ZPDIEXTRACTHEIGHT AS extract_height, ZPDIHEIGHTALLOW AS height_allow, ZPDIHEIGHTSTEP AS height_step, ZPDIMINLZKT AS min_lzkt, ZPDIMAXLZKT AS max_lzkt, ZPDIDADO AS dado FROM dced_prj_legsetconfig WHERE ZPDIPRJID = #{projectId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: REPLACE INTO dced_prj_legsetconfig ( ZPDILEGSETID, ZPDIEXTRACTHEIGHT, ZPDIHEIGHTALLOW, ZPDIHEIGHTSTEP, ZPDIMINLZKT, ZPDIMAXLZKT, ZPDIDADO, ZPDIPRJID ) VALUES ( #{ruleId}, #{extractHeight}, #{heightAllow}, #{heightStep}, #{minLzkt}, #{maxLzkt}, #{dado}, #{projectId} )
